_meta.note: Per-artifact 'last changed' feed sorted descending by date. Skill events from manifest.last_threat_review; catalog events from data/<catalog>.json _meta.last_updated.

events.note: Triage entry-point for raw threat intel — researches an input across all exceptd data catalogs, RWEP-scores it, and routes the operator to the right specialized skill(s)
Modern attack surface management + pen testing methodology for AI-era environments — NIST 800-115, OWASP WSTG, PTES, ATT&CK-driven adversary emulation, TIBER-EU

Continuous fuzzing as a security control — coverage-guided fuzz (AFL++/libFuzzer), AI-assisted fuzz, OSS-Fuzz integration, kernel fuzz (syzkaller), AI-API fuzz, integration into CI/CD as compliance evidence

DLP gap analysis for mid-2026 — legacy DLP misses LLM prompts, MCP tool args, RAG retrievals, embedding-store exfil, and code-completion telemetry. Audit channels, classifiers, protected surfaces, enforcement actions, and evidence trails against modern threat reality and cross-jurisdictional privacy regimes
Supply-chain integrity for mid-2026 — SLSA L3+, in-toto attestations, Sigstore signing, SBOM (CycloneDX/SPDX), VEX via CSAF 2.0, AI-generated code provenance, model weights as supply-chain artifacts
Map offensive findings (CVE / TTP / framework gap) to MITRE D3FEND defensive countermeasures with explicit defense-in-depth, least-privilege, and zero-trust layering
Identity assurance for mid-2026 — NIST 800-63 AAL/IAL/FAL, FIDO2/WebAuthn passkeys, OIDC/SAML/SCIM, agent-as-principal identity, short-lived workload tokens, OAuth 2.0 + RFC 9700 BCP
OT / ICS security for mid-2026 — NIST 800-82r3, IEC 62443-3-3, NERC CIP, IT/OT convergence risks, AI-augmented HMI threats, ICS-specific TTPs (ATT&CK for ICS)

Coordinated Vulnerability Disclosure for mid-2026 — ISO 29147 (disclosure) + ISO 30111 (handling) + VDP + bug bounty + CSAF 2.0 advisories + security.txt + EU CRA / NIS2 regulator-mandated disclosure + AI vulnerability classes
Threat modeling methodologies for mid-2026 — STRIDE, PASTA, LINDDUN (privacy), Cyber Kill Chain, Diamond Model, MITRE Unified Kill Chain, AI-system threat modeling, agent-based threat modeling

Web application security for mid-2026 — OWASP Top 10 2025, OWASP ASVS v5, CWE root-cause coverage, AI-generated code weakness drift, server-rendered vs SPA tradeoffs, defense-in-depth across the request lifecycle

AI governance and risk management for mid-2026 — ISO/IEC 23894 risk process, ISO/IEC 42001 management system, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act high-risk obligations, AI impact assessments, AI red-team programs, AI incident lifecycle

Healthcare sector cybersecurity for mid-2026 — HIPAA + HITRUST + HL7 FHIR security, medical device cyber (FDA + EU MDR), AI-in-healthcare under EU AI Act + FDA AI/ML SaMD guidance, patient data flows through LLM clinical tools

Financial services cybersecurity for mid-2026 — EU DORA TLPT, PSD2 RTS-SCA, SWIFT CSCF v2026, NYDFS 23 NYCRR 500, FFIEC CAT, MAS TRM, APRA CPS 234, IL BoI Directive 361, OSFI B-13; Threat-Led Pen Testing schemes TIBER-EU + CBEST + iCAST

Federal government + defense contractor cybersecurity for mid-2026 — FedRAMP Rev5, CMMC 2.0, EO 14028, NIST 800-171/172 CUI, FISMA, M-22-09 federal Zero Trust, OMB M-24-04 AI risk, CISA BOD/ED; cross-jurisdiction NCSC UK, ENISA EUCC, AU PSPF, IL government cyber methodology

Electric power + oil & gas + water/wastewater + renewable-integration cybersecurity for mid-2026 — NERC CIP v6/v7, NIST 800-82r3, TSA Pipeline SD-2021-02C, AWWA cyber, EU NIS2 energy + NCCS-G (cross-border electricity), AU AESCSF + SOCI, ENISA energy sector

API security for mid-2026 — OWASP API Top 10 2023, AI-API specific (rate limits, prompt-shape egress, MCP HTTP transport), GraphQL + gRPC + REST + WebSocket attack surfaces, API gateway posture, BOLA/BFLA/SSRF/Mass Assignment
Cloud security for mid-2026 — CSPM/CWPP/CNAPP posture, CSA CCM v4, AWS/Azure/GCP shared responsibility, cloud workload identity federation, runtime security with eBPF, AI workloads on cloud

Container + Kubernetes runtime security for mid-2026 — CIS K8s Benchmark, NSA/CISA Hardening, Pod Security Standards, Kyverno/Gatekeeper admission, Sigstore policy-controller, eBPF runtime detection (Falco/Tetragon), AI inference workload hardening

MLOps pipeline security for mid-2026 — training data integrity, model registry signing, deployment pipeline provenance, inference serving hardening, drift detection, feedback loop integrity; covers MLflow / Kubeflow / Vertex AI / SageMaker / Azure ML / Hugging Face

Incident response playbook design for mid-2026 — NIST 800-61r3, ISO 27035, ATT&CK-driven detection, PICERL phases, AI-class incident handling (prompt injection breach, model exfiltration, AI-API C2), cross-jurisdiction breach notification timing

Email security + anti-phishing for mid-2026 — SPF/DKIM/DMARC/BIMI/ARC/MTA-STS/TLSRPT, AI-augmented phishing (vishing, deepfake video, hyperpersonalized email), Business Email Compromise, secure email gateways

Age-related gates and child online safety for mid-2026 — COPPA + CIPA + California AADC + GDPR Art. 8 + DSA Art. 28 + UK Online Safety Act + UK Children's Code + AU Online Safety Act + IN DPDPA child provisions + KOSA pending; age verification standards (IEEE 2089-2021, OpenID Connect age claims); AI product age policies
Assess Linux kernel LPE exposure — Copy Fail, Dirty Frag, live-patch vs. reboot remediation
Comprehensive AI/ML attack surface assessment mapped to MITRE ATLAS v5.1.0 with gap flags
Enumerate MCP trust boundary failures — tool allowlisting, signed manifests, bearer auth, zero-interaction RCE
Feed a framework control ID and threat scenario — receive the gap between what the control covers and what current TTPs require
Detect where an organization passes an audit but remains exposed — seven documented compliance theater patterns
Real-World Exploit Priority (RWEP) scoring — CVSS plus KEV, PoC, AI-acceleration, blast radius, live-patch factors
RAG-specific threat model — embedding manipulation, vector store poisoning, retrieval filter bypass, indirect prompt injection
Detect adversary use of AI APIs as covert C2 — SesameOp pattern, PROMPTFLUX/PROMPTSTEAL behavioral signatures
Generate defensible policy exceptions for architectural realities — ephemeral infra, AI pipelines, ZTA, no-reboot patching
Score how current an org's threat model is against 2026 reality — 14-item checklist, currency percentage, prioritized update roadmap
Multi-jurisdiction GRC mapping — EU (GDPR/NIS2/DORA/EU AI Act/CRA), UK, AU, SG, JP, IN, CA, ISO 27001:2022, CSA CCM v4
Run the zero-day learning loop — CVE to attack vector to control gap to framework gap to new control requirement
Post-quantum cryptography first mentality — hard version gates (OpenSSL 3.5+), algorithm sunset tracking, HNDL assessment, loopback learning for NIST/IETF evolution
Meta-skill for keeping all exceptd skills current — CISA KEV triggers, ATLAS version updates, framework amendments, forward_watch resolution, currency scoring
Three-tier implementation roadmap — MVP (ship this week), Practical (scalable today), Overkill (defense-in-depth)
